# Devtimize
> A boutique product engineering studio building web apps, mobile apps,
> desktop software, AI chatbots, trading bots, and automation tools.
> Founded by Shoaib Liaqat and Hamza Amin — two CS graduates
> from Pakistan serving clients globally.

## Contact
- Email: devtimize@gmail.com
- Shoaib: +923016672356
- Hamza: +923026160466
- Website: https://devtimize.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/devtimize
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/devtimize

## Services
- Web Development: React, MERN, Laravel, Flask, ASP.NET Core, .NET
- Mobile & Desktop: Flutter (iOS/Android), WPF, Tkinter
- AI & Automation: Python chatbots, RAG systems, trading bots, TensorFlow, LangChain
- APIs & Integrations: REST APIs, Stripe, OneSignal, third-party services
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, Vercel
- Maintenance & Support: ongoing updates, retainers, bug fixes

## Key Projects Delivered
- Trading Bot (Backtest + Live): Python algorithmic trading with real-time execution
- Chatbot & RAG Assistant: LangChain-based Q&A system with custom knowledge base
- Event Push App: Flutter mobile app with OneSignal push notifications
- Emotion Detector: Desktop app with CNN-based facial emotion recognition
- Vendor Shipment Portal: ASP.NET MVC web portal for logistics management
- Inventory & Billing System: WPF + SQLite desktop software
- Restaurant Website: Full-featured restaurant web presence
- E-Commerce Website: MERN-based online store with payments

## Founders
- Shoaib Liaqat | BSCS, Baba Guru Nanak University
  Specializes in Flutter, React, MERN, Flask, .NET, cloud deployments
- Hamza Amin | BSCS, Islamic University Islamabad
  Specializes in Python, AI automation, chatbots, trading bots, RAG

- 5/5 stars from Riasat Ali — exceeded expectations
- 5/5 stars from Saif Ur Rahman (University of Gujrat) — beyond expectations at low budget
- 5/5 stars from Nadeem (IT Care) — changed the way their team works

## Pricing
- Simple sites: from $150
- Web/mobile apps: $500–$2,500
- AI systems & bots: $2,000+
- Free custom quote: devtimize@gmail.com
